blended.narrative: Windham Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 61°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 26°F.
